name: Neocron RenoDX Engine — HLSL pixel-shader injection
author: Neocron Community
description: ReShade Add-on Edition .addon32 that hooks D3D9 create_pipeline to substitute Neocron's world.ps (CRC 0x2ccf5eb7) AND mesh.ps (CRC 0x96f566cb — NPCs, items, decals, signs) with runtime-compiled HLSL replacements. Per-texture normal-mapped Phong: each game texture is fingerprinted via D3D9 LockRect on first use, looked up against either the HD index (deployed by the nc2-hd-textures addon) or the engine-bundled stock index, and the matching `_n.png` is bound at sampler 5. Surfaces with no per-tex match pass through vanilla (no fake bump). Tunables (bump amp, light range, debug viz) live in the ReShade overlay → Add-ons tab.
